completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
completion_promises.evidence: All Python files created/modified by this task (tests/test_scaffold.py, agents/__init__.py, tools/__init__.py) pass both 'ruff check' and 'ruff format --check' with zero errors.
